mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_PAPER.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_PAPER( ID, EXAM_POLICY_ID, PAPER_URL, GUID, STATUS, USED, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, TIME, TOTLE_SCORE, PASS_SCORE )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{examPolicyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{paperUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{used,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 , #{time,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totleScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{passScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_PAPER SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXAM_QUESTION.ID,CONTENT,EXAM_QUESTION.TYPE,EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.SCORE FROM EXAM_PAPER,EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL,EXAM_QUESTION WHERE EXAM_PAPER.ID=EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.PAPERS_ID AND EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.QUESTION_ID=EXAM_QUESTION.ID AND EXAM_PAPER.ID=#{paperId} ORDER BY EXAM_QUESTION.ID

SELECT EXAM_PAPER.ID FROM EXAM_PAPER,EXAM_SCOPE_POLICY_REL WHERE EXAM_PAPER.EXAM_POLICY_ID=EXAM_SCOPE_POLICY_REL.POLICY_ID AND EXAM_SCOPE_POLICY_REL.SCOPE_ID=#{scopeId} AND EXAM_PAPER.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND EXAM_PAPER.STATUS='YES' ORDER BY EXAM_PAPER.ID

SELECT EXAM_ANSWER.ID AS ANSWERID,EXAM_ANSWER.QUESTION_ID AS QUESTIONID,EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.SCORE FROM EXAM_ANSWER,EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL,EXAM_QUESTION WHERE EXAM_QUESTION."ID"=EXAM_ANSWER.QUESTION_ID AND EXAM_QUESTION."ID"=EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.QUESTION_ID AND EXAM_QUESTION.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND EXAM_ANSWER.ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND (EXAM_QUESTION."TYPE"='SINGLE' OR EXAM_QUESTION."TYPE"='MULT' OR EXAM_QUESTION."TYPE"='JUDGE') AND EXAM_ANSWER.VALID=1 AND EXAM_PAPER_QUESTION_REL.PAPERS_ID=#{paperId}
